sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_array (id Int32, values Array(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_array VALUES (1, groupArrayInsertAt('default', 2)(toString(number), number));
UPDATE test_array SET values = groupArrayInsertAt('updated', 1)(values, 2) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, groupArrayInsertAt('empty', 5)(values, 3) AS modified_values FROM test_array;
